name: Can I sue my employer if I fell off a ladder on the job in West Valley City?
description: No vs employer, yes vs negligent third parties.

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer if I fell off a ladder on the job in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: No vs employer, yes vs negligent third parties.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Generally no, Utah workers' comp is exclusive remedy** against employer.[1]

Sue third parties like ladder maker or site owner if negligent.[6] Idaho similar.

- Prove defect or unsafe site.
- Workers' comp lien subtracted.
- Higher payouts possible.

Identify parties; attorney investigates.
